title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Regicide Legacy**
*2025*
Defeat corrupted enemies and unlock rewards over 12 challenging missions.
![Regicide Legacy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_244b3732.jpg)

2. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_ace6f9e0.jpg)

3. **Yotei**
*2025*
A Machi building game of forest, mountains, and potatoes.
![Yotei](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_e52a6c48.png)

4. **Brass: Pittsburgh**
*2027*
Take part in the United States' late 19th-century industrial boom.
![Brass: Pittsburgh](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_037a62d7.png)

5. **Goa**
*2004*
Run a spice trade business in colonial-era India in this closed-loop economy game.
![Goa](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_7f1dbd8d.jpg)

6. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_ecf19ff6.png)

7. **Ostia**
*2022*
1-4 players create trade routes in the Mediterranean using a mancala/resource system!
![Ostia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_a8081924.jpg)

8. **Mechs vs. Minions**
*2016*
Cooperatively program and pilot your mechs to defeat an army of marauding minions.
![Mechs vs. Minions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_ba3f728b.jpg)

9. **Regicide**
*2020*
Work together as brave adventurers to defeat the corrupted monarchy.
![Regicide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_af6dd3ae.jpg)

10. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_f6851536.jpg)

11. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_e4e16eae.jpg)

12. **Arcs**
*2024*
Rule the galaxy with your court, fleet, and cities.
![Arcs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_a2a09921.png)

13. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_2f5ce783.jpg)

14. **Eternal Decks**
*2025*
Can you solve each stage before your deck runs out?
![Eternal Decks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_0c1e7288.png)

15. **Wondrous Creatures**
*2024*
Build the best reserve in the world for 100+ fantastic creatures!
![Wondrous Creatures](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_e70f0b50.jpg)

16. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_492e44e2.jpg)

17. **Spirit Island**
*2017*
Island Spirits join forces using elemental powers to defend their home from invaders.
![Spirit Island](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_c8bf3bdc.jpg)

18. **Speakeasy**
*2025*
Earn money running a Manhattan speakeasy business during Prohibition.
![Speakeasy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_5cb6f1dd.jpg)

19. **Dune: Imperium – Uprising**
*2023*
Deploy agents, build your deck, and engage in strategic battles to control Arrakis.
![Dune: Imperium – Uprising](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_905a2572.jpg)

20. **Slay the Spire: The Board Game**
*2024*
Craft a unique deck, discover powerful relics, and Slay the Spire together!
![Slay the Spire: The Board Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_f324d46e.png)

21. **Root**
*2018*
Decide the fate of the woodland as asymmetric factions fight for contrasting goals.
![Root](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_b9d1edc1.jpg)

22. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_0cae5687.jpg)

23. **Arkham Horror: The Card Game**
*2026*
Investigate the mysteries of Arkham while cosmic horrors stand in your way.
![Arkham Horror: The Card Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_9d065289.png)

24. **Terraforming Mars**
*2016*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_002f8556.jpg)

25. **Cozy Stickerville**
*2026*
Build your village with over 800 stickers! 
![Cozy Stickerville](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_047e2639.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*15 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_d297dac4.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*23 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_b28c2215.jpg)

3. **Castle Combo**
*18 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_90d7d1ce.jpg)

4. **Ark Nova**
*51 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_b97007fd.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*87 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_9a96909b.jpg)

6. **Bomb Busters**
*11 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_31b92740.png)

7. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**

9. **Terraforming Mars**

10. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*33 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_f0ffce47.jpg)

11. **Forest Shuffle**
*30 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_b5c04dae.jpg)

12. **Cascadia**
*56 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_51ab2a78.jpg)

13. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*63 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_3f564177.jpg)

14. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*16 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_3dcfb2f5.jpg)

15. **Faraway**
*23 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_6da132d3.png)

16. **Sky Team**
*30 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_2393c159.jpg)

17. **Hot Streak**
*2 months on the list*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_04b8c75c.jpg)

18. **Magical Athlete**
*2 months on the list*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_8edaaaed.png)

19. **The Gang**
*9 months on the list*

20. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**

Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.

*273 months on the list*

*16 months on the list*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_4d35dfbe.jpg)

![Splendor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-14/toplist/bgg_36a09b98.jpg)
